programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Arron Crascall. Arron Crascall and his family have experienced paranormal activity in their home. The team find evidence linking the house to a man who died a century ago. S1, Ep4

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Toyah Willcox. Toyah Willcox has experienced strange activity in her home since she moved in. The team undergo one of their most terrifying investigations yet to find the cause. S1, Ep5
Teleshopping.
Vintage Retro. In Tyne and Wear Drew tries to satisfy a customer with a taste for mid-century chic. Plus, he is enchanted by a former friary where a rare mirror catches his eye. S9, Ep11
Edinburgh Zoo. Drew checks out unlikely animal items at Edinburgh Zoo. And, he rummages through a historic textile mill in the Scottish borders for industrial furniture. S9, Ep12
A couple plan to move to the Dorset coast now that their children have moved out. They have a £550,000 budget they plan to spend on a spacious property. S7, Ep8

Prospective buyers around the UK wanting to swap hectic city living for a home in the country are shown an array of beautiful rural properties. S17, Ep11
Rural Life. In London, Drew visits a fledgling antiques business run by an enterprising young couple. Plus, he faces punishing negotiations at a living history museum in Surrey. S9, Ep14
Cornwall At War. Drew gets a scoop when he delves into the history and mechanics of print in London's Fleet Street. And, in Devon, he indulges his passion for architectural salvage. S9, Ep15
Drew and Tee head to the former East Germany, birthplace of early modern design. They visit a fair full of Bauhaus brilliance in Berlin and one of Europe's biggest flea markets. S17, Ep1

A High Spirits Hoard. A cancer survivor wants to sell his beloved whisky collection for a good cause. And a huge decorative pot is the surprise draw on auction day. S4, Ep14

programmes.show_name: Who Do You Think You Are?
programmes.show_description: Andrew Lloyd Webber. Andrew Lloyd Webber is astonished to uncover stories from his family's history, including an ancestor with a famous cello-playing brother! S19, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programmes.show_description: Davina and Nicky catch up with three searchers desperate to find their parents, including John, who was reunited with his birth mother after 50 years. S7, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Martin Roberts. Martin Roberts bought a 17th century farmhouse and immediately sensed spirits in it. The team set out to uncover the extraordinary secrets of this ancient house. S1, Ep6

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Louie Spence. The dance star is spooked by strange smells and sinister shadows. He hopes it's his late mum, but the investigation goes down a murderous route no one sees coming! S2, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen. Laurence's home has a history of harrowing hauntings. When the home reveals its Quaker past, a spirit comes forward with a murderous story to tell. S2, Ep2
